creator: timon@timon.net.nz
text:
Created attachment 175993
Patch for Makefile, distinfo & files directory

Hi,

This is a patch to unbreak and update x11-themes/gtk-qt4-engine.
* Project moved to github
* Port updated to last master commit (there is no tags/branches in github yet)
* All patches regenerated with make makepatch
* Set WRKSRC_SUBDIR instead of altering WRKSRC
* Added information about license
* I bump PORTREVISION because sources in Github a little bit newer than sources from Google code, but this is still version 1.1. If you think that this is not correct — feel free to revert this change in Makefile.
